scripts.dev:app: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const app=process.env.APP; if(!app){console.error('APP is required. Example: $env:APP=\"rule-form-builder\"; pnpm run dev:app'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync('pnpm',['-C',`apps/${app}`,'dev'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:app: node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process'); const app=process.env.APP; if(!app){console.error('APP is required. Example: $env:APP=\"rule-form-builder\"; pnpm run test:app'); process.exit(1);} const r=spawnSync('pnpm',['-C',`apps/${app}`,'test'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:true}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
